heading_content_part: TalkU

Privacy Policy – Free Phone Calls, Texts & Walkie Talkie, PTTPrivacy PolicyThetalkyou.mewebsite (the Website or TalkU Website) and TalkU mobile applications (the Software or TalkU Software) are    owned and operated by TalkU International Inc. ("TalkU", "us" or "we"). Our Privacy Policy explains how we,    and some of the companies we work with, collect, use, share and protect information in relation to our    websites and TalkU Software (collectively, the "Service").
Information We Collect
(1) Contacts Information

You need to allow TalkU to access your address book on your mobile device. By authorizing the access you can easily send messages and make calls, forward messages and files, share contacts information, or initiate a conference call to your friends and family. A simplified copy of the address book with information such as the name, phone number, and ringtone of each contact will be stored and used to display the identity of the caller who's in the user's contact book(the caller will also be automatically added to the user's TalkU friend list) in the push notification. We create a cryptographic hash value of the transmitted information to prevent any misuse. The information will not be shared with any third parties and will be removed permanently once the user disables the app.

(2) Personal InformationWhen you install TalkU Software on your mobile device, you are required to provide a mobile phone number to receive an access code via SMS. The phone number will be saved on the TalkU servers. The phone number is also used to discover other TalkU users who have your phone number in their address book.

When you create a TalkU account, we may ask for personal information, like your name or email address. We may also collect demographic information, such as age, gender, or preferences. We might also ask you to create a publicly-visible profile, which may include your name and photo. These information might be used to provide personalized content and information to you and others, which could include online ads or other forms of marketing.If you register with a third-party account, we may collect the information such as age, gender, address or portrait from your third-party account and use it to complete your profile on TalkU.

(3) Location InformationCertain TalkU features require access to the location information on your mobile phone. Some features, such as "Find Nearby Friends" also store your location information in our servers, and share your location information with other TalkU users. If you are concerned about the privacy of your location information, we recommend you do not use those features.
(4) Device Information

When you install TalkU on your device, we may automatically collect certain information from your device, including an Android, Apple iOS, or other ID, device maker and model, mobile web browser type and version, IP address, MAC address, the operating system’s maker and version, location information, MCC (Mobile Country Code) information, the mobile application name and other technical data about your device and use them as identifying information to detect, investigate, prevent, or address technical issues or illegal activity.

A list of specific mobile applications installed on your device will also be collected to provide certain features, such as signing in from a third-party service or sharing messages on other third-party apps and services.

(5) Usage InformationWe automatically collect usage information that does not identify an individual user. For example, when you install TalkU on your device, we automatically collect information such as your device type, operating system version and type, IP address, certain unique device identifiers (such as Android ID, MAC address, and IDFA) and carrier and other information for your device. We use this information to enhance the services we offer and to help us understand how people use the Service.

(6) Analytic InformationWe use third-party analytic tools to help us measure traffic and usage trends for the Service. These tools collect information sent by your device or our Service, including the web pages you visit, TalkU software screens you access, and other information that assists us in improving the Service. We collect and use this analytic information with analytic information from other users so that it cannot reasonably be used to identify any particular individual user.
(7) Cookie and Tracking

A cookie is a string of information that a website stores on a visitor's computer, and that the visitor's browser provides to the website each time the visitor returns. TalkU uses cookies to help TalkU identify and track visitors, their usage of the TalkU website, and their website access preferences. TalkU visitors who do not wish to have cookies placed on their computers should set their browsers to refuse cookies before using TalkU' websites, with the drawback that certain features of TalkU's websites may not function properly without the aid of cookies.
We use analytic tools provided by Google, AppsFlyer and others which use other visitor identification technology that help TalkU identify users and track usage of our Service.

(8) CacheWhen you use TalkU to send a multimedia message (such as sharing a picture, or sharing a video clip), the multimedia content will be cached in TalkU servers for enhancing the responding speed of our service and increasing the effectiveness of performance. The cached content will be removed after a certain period of months. TalkU does not provide any means for you to delete the cached content manually.

(9) Share DataShare Data is the data that you provide for use with TalkU, such as text, audio, photos and videos you make available through the app or contacts you add or import for use with TalkU, which might be used to ensure our services are working as intended and aid in more efficient delivery of our services, and also may be made available to third parties by your actions when using TalkU.

How We Use InformationIn addition to some of the specific uses of information we describe in this Privacy Policy, we may use    information that we receive to:Allow us to keep you posted on TalkU's latest product announcements, application updates, and            upcoming events.Help us develop, deliver, test and improve our products, and services.Provide personalized content and information to you and others, which could include online ads or            other forms of marketing.
Provide, improve, test, and monitor the effectiveness of our Service.Monitor metrics such as total number of visitors, traffic, and demographic patterns.Diagnose or fix technology problems.

International Data Transfers

We may need to transfer your information to other Groups or service providers in countries outside the European Economic Area (EEA). The EEA consists of countries in the European Union, Switzerland, Iceland, Liechtenstein and Norway: they are considered to have equivalent laws when it comes to data protection and privacy. This kind of data transfer may happen if our servers (i.e. where we store data) or our suppliers and service providers are based outside the EEA, or if you use our services and products while visiting countries outside this area.

If TalkU sends your information to a country that is not in the EEA, we will make sure that your information is properly protected. We will always ensure that there is a proper legal agreement that covers the data transfer. In addition, if the country is not considered to have laws that are equivalent to EU data protection standards then we will ask the third party to enter into a legal agreement that reflects those standards.

If there’s no legal requirement, we’ll only store it for as long as we need to.We’re required by law to keep certain personal information about how you use our services for 12 months.

heading_content_part: We’ll never ask for your secure personal or account information by an unsolicited means of communication. You’re responsible for keeping your personal and account information secure and not sharing it with others.

heading_content_part: Link to Ads and Other ServiceThe Service may contain services, products, and/or links to other services, products, and websites, that are    not owned or controlled by us. Please be aware that we are not responsible for the content nor for the    privacy practices of these other websites, products, and services. We encourage you to be aware when you    access a third party’s website or service and to read the privacy statements of each and every website and    service you visit.

decoder_heading: Link to Ads and Other Service
ident_heading: Link to Ads and Other Service
heading_content_part: Some of our advertisers and/or advertising partners may display ads on TalkU’s products or services that    directly solicit information, or contain technology to collect information about our users. This information    is collected and used by our advertisers and/or advertising partners, and is outside of our control. If you    have any questions about a particular advertisement, you should contact the responsible advertiser directly.
Do Not Track NoticeCurrently, we do not respond to “Do Not Track” requests.

Children's Personal InformationAll TalkU services and websites are not intended for children under the age of 13. Children under the age of    13 should not use them at any time.    TalkU does not knowingly collect any information from children under the age of 13. In the event that we    learn that we have collected personal information from a child under age 13 without parental consent, TalkU    will promptly delete such personal information in a secure manner.

Business TransferIf TalkU, or substantially all of its assets were acquired, or in the unlikely event that TalkU goes out of    business or enters bankruptcy, user information would be one of the assets that would be transferred or    acquired by a third party. You acknowledge that such transfers may occur, and that any acquirer of TalkU may    continue to use your personal information as set forth in this policy.

Privacy Policy ChangeTalkU may change its Privacy Policy from time to time, and at TalkU's sole discretion. TalkU encourages    visitors or users to frequently check this page for any changes to its Privacy Policy. Your continued access    to the Website or use of the Software after any change in this Privacy Policy will constitute your    acceptance of such a change.

Your RightsBelow we set out details on how you can exercise your rights. If you have a question or cannot find the answer, please email us at info@talkyou.me.Please note, some of these rights such as the right to data portability and right to restriction, apply from 25 May 2018.    Contact us at any time to:Request access to information that TalkU has about youCorrect any information that TalkU has about youDelete information that TalkU has about you
If you have any additional questions about TalkU’s collection and storage of data, please contact us at: info@talkyou.me.
